name: LanguageHandler
summary: The LanguageHandler class contains methods used to help make SketchUp extensions easier to localize across different languages. It looks for translated resources within the Resources folder in the extension's directory structure. All translated resources should be located within the appropriate language folder and encoded in UTF-8. The strings file should include “key”=“value” string pairs in the following format: language code gocorp_swiveldriver/Resources/fr/swiveldriver.strings

constructors.name: initialize
constructors.summary: The new method is used to create a new LanguageHandler object.
constructors.remarks: The new method is used to create a new LanguageHandler object.

params.name: filename
params.doc: The name of the file that contains the localized strings with their keys in UTF-8 encoding.

methods.summary: Looks up and returns the localized version of a given string, based on the language SketchUp is currently running in, and the available translations in the Resources folder.
methods.remarks: Looks up and returns the localized version of a given string, based on the language SketchUp is currently running in, and the available translations in the Resources folder.

params.name: key
params.doc: The key for the string to be retrieved.

methods.name: resource_path
methods.summary: Returns a string containing the path to the given filename if it can be found in the Resources folder.
methods.remarks: Returns a string containing the path to the given filename if it can be found in the Resources folder.

returns.doc: the location of the file in the Resources folder.

methods.name: strings
methods.summary: Returns a Hash object containing the localization dictionary.
methods.remarks: Returns a Hash object containing the localization dictionary.
